migration_path.description: Ordered migration steps with explicit gates: which steps depend on which, and what must be verified before the next step starts

compatibility_strategy.description: How frozen contracts are preserved during migration: shim approach, dual-running period, and when the old behavior is retired

rollback_plan.description: Per-step rollback approach: what state is left behind on failure, whether rollback is safe, and what triggers it

regression_guards.description: Tests and verification checks that must pass before each gate: what they cover and what gaps remain

testing_strategy.description: Testing approach for migration steps: how to verify behavioral equivalence before retiring old behavior

nfrs.description: Non-functional requirements for the migration itself: downtime tolerance, migration window, data integrity guarantees

open_questions.description: Unresolved architectural ambiguities blocking the tech stack stage
